---
title: "CGM QC Features"
author: "Tyler Tong"
date: today
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    embed-resources: true
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: false
engine: knitr
---

# Load packages

```{R}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(gt)
library(purrr)
library(janitor)
library(jsonlite)
library(lubridate)
library(data.table)
```

# Lead data

```{R}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
datapath <- "/Users/tt/Library/CloudStorage/Box-Box/ai-readi/v3-mini/dataset"
cgm_manifest_path <- "/wearable_blood_glucose/manifest.tsv"
cgm_manifest <- read_tsv(paste0(datapath, cgm_manifest_path))
participant_id <- c(1029)
relative_path <- cgm_manifest |> 
  filter(person_id %in% participant_id) |>
  select(glucose_filepath)
cgm <- fromJSON(file(paste0(datapath, relative_path)), flatten = TRUE)
```

# Create new header files

```{r}
uuid <- cgm$header$uuid
timezone <- cgm$header$timezone
schema_name <- cgm$header$schema_id$name
newheader <- tibble(uuid = uuid, 
                    timezone = timezone, 
                    schema_name = schema_name)
cgm$header <- newheader
cgm$header
```

# Clean cgm readings

```{R}
cgm_readings <- cgm$body$cgm |> 
  as_tibble()
cgm_readings <- cgm_readings |>
  filter(event_type == "EGV", .preserve = TRUE)
cgm_readings <- select(cgm_readings, 
                       event_type, 
                       effective_time_frame.time_interval.start_date_time, 
                       blood_glucose.unit, 
                       blood_glucose.value)
```

# Get location based on timezone

```{r}
newheader <- newheader |>
  mutate(location = case_when())
if(newheader$timezone == "pst" | newheader$timezone == "pdt")
  newheader$location <- "America/Los_Angeles"
if(newheader$timezone == "mst" | newheader$timezone == "mdt")
  newheader$location <- "America/Denver"
if(newheader$timezone == "cst" | newheader$timezone == "cdt")
  newheader$location <- "America/Chicago"
if(newheader$timezone == "est" | newheader$timezone == "edt")
  newheader$location <- "America/New_York"
```

# Get datetime instead of char

```{R}
cgm_readings <- cgm_readings |> 
  mutate(datetime = ymd_hms(effective_time_frame.time_interval.start_date_time))
```

# Convert to local time

```{R}
cgm_readings <- cgm_readings |>
  mutate(dt_local = 
         if_else(str_sub(effective_time_frame.time_interval.start_date_time, -1, -1) == "Z", 
       with_tz(time = datetime, tzone = newheader$location), 
       datetime))
cgm_readings <- cgm_readings 
```

# Remove duplicates
```{r}
cgm_readings <- cgm_readings |>
  distinct()
```


# Get unusual cgms and remove from dataset

```{r}
cgm_readings <- cgm_readings |>
  mutate(is_unusual = (blood_glucose.value > 400 | blood_glucose.value < 40))
normal_cgm_readings <- cgm_readings |>
  filter(is_unusual == FALSE)
```

# Create reading-level table

```{R}
reading_cgm <- normal_cgm_readings |> 
  select(blood_glucose.value, dt_local)
head(reading_cgm)
```

# Count days

```{R}
daycounts <- normal_cgm_readings |> 
  count(date(dt_local))
head(daycounts)
```

# Remove invalid days

```{R}
normal_cgm_readings <- normal_cgm_readings |> 
  mutate("date(dt_local)" = date(dt_local)) |>
  left_join(daycounts, by = "date(dt_local)" ) |>
  filter(n >= 202) |>
  select(!n) |>
  select(!`date(dt_local)`)
```

# Create summary table

```{R}
validdaycounts <- filter(daycounts, n >= 202)
summary <- list(num_readings = nrow(normal_cgm_readings), 
                num_days = nrow(validdaycounts), 
                mean_cgm = mean(normal_cgm_readings$blood_glucose.value, na.rm = TRUE),
                median_cgm = median(normal_cgm_readings$blood_glucose.value, na.rm = TRUE),
                sd_cgm = sd(normal_cgm_readings$blood_glucose.value, na.rm = TRUE),
                CV_cgm = (sd(normal_cgm_readings$blood_glucose.value, na.rm = TRUE)/
                            mean(normal_cgm_readings$blood_glucose.value, na.rm = TRUE)) * 100,
                medium_cgm = sum((
                  normal_cgm_readings$blood_glucose.value > 70 & 
                    normal_cgm_readings$blood_glucose.value < 180), na.rm = TRUE) * 100/
                  nrow(normal_cgm_readings),
                low_cgm = sum((normal_cgm_readings$blood_glucose.value < 70), na.rm = TRUE) * 100/
                  nrow(normal_cgm_readings),
                high_cgm = sum((normal_cgm_readings$blood_glucose.value > 180), na.rm = TRUE) * 100/
                  nrow(normal_cgm_readings))

summary

```

# Participant day data

```{R}
day_time_start <- "06:00:00"
day_time_end <- "23:59:59"
normal_cgm_readings <- normal_cgm_readings |>
  mutate(day = date(dt_local)) |>
  group_by(day) |>
  add_count(day) |>
  rename(num_readings_day = n) |>
  mutate(daily_pct_expected = num_readings_day * 100 / 288) |>
  mutate(daily_avg_cgm = mean(blood_glucose.value)) |>
  mutate(daily_cgm_sd = sd(blood_glucose.value)) |>
  mutate(cgm_level = case_when(blood_glucose.value > 70 & 
                    blood_glucose.value < 180 ~ "mid", 
                   blood_glucose.value < 70 ~ "low",
                   blood_glucose.value > 180 ~ "high")) |>
  ungroup() |>
  group_by(day, cgm_level) |>
  add_count(cgm_level) |>
  rename(num_category = n) |>
  mutate(pct_category = num_category * 100 / 288) |>
  ungroup() |>
  group_by(day) |>
  mutate(time_local = format(dt_local, format = "%H:%M:%S")) |>
  mutate(is_day = case_when(as.ITime(time_local) >= as.ITime(day_time_start) & 
                              as.ITime(time_local) <= as.ITime(day_time_end) ~ TRUE, 
                            as.ITime(time_local) < as.ITime(day_time_start) | 
                              as.ITime(time_local) > as.ITime(day_time_end) ~ FALSE)) |>
  add_count(is_day) |>
  ungroup() |>
  group_by(day, is_day) |>
  mutate(day_night_avg = mean(blood_glucose.value))
glimpse(normal_cgm_readings)
```
